debug_info.goal:
a b c d : ℝ
hd0 : 0 < d
hdc : d ≤ c
hcb : c ≤ b
hba : b ≤ a
h1 : a + b + c + d = 1
⊢ (a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d) * a ^ a * b ^ b * c ^ c * d ^ d < 1

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
have ha : 0 < a := by linarith
  have hb : 0 < b := by linarith
  have hc : 0 < c := by linarith
  have h_sum : a * Real.log a + b * Real.log b + c * Real.log c + d * Real.log d + Real.log (a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d) < 0 := by
    have h_log_a : Real.log a < 0 := Real.log_neg ha (by linarith)
    have h_log_b : Real.log b ≤ Real.log a := Real.log_le_log hb hba
    have h_log_c : Real.log c ≤ Real.log a := Real.log_le_log hc (by linarith)
    have h_log_d : Real.log d ≤ Real.log a := Real.log_le_log hd0 (by linarith)
    have h_sum_log : a * Real.log a + b * Real.log b + c * Real.log c + d * Real.log d ≤ Real.log a := by
      calc a * Real.log a + b * Real.log b + c * Real.log c + d * Real.log d
        _ ≤ a * Real.log a + b * Real.log a + c * Real.log a + d * Real.log a := by
            nlinarith [h_log_b, h_log_c, h_log_d]
        _ = (a + b + c + d) * Real.log a := by ring
        _ = Real.log a := by rw [h1]; ring
    have h_prod_lt : a * (a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d) < 1 := by
      have : a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d ≤ 1 + 2 * b + 3 * c + 3 * d := by linarith
      have : 1 + 2 * b + 3 * c + 3 * d ≤ 1 + 3 * (b + c + d) := by linarith
      have : 1 + 3 * (b + c + d) = 1 + 3 * (1 - a) := by rw [← h1]; ring
      have hS : a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d ≤ 4 - 3 * a := by linarith
      have : a * (4 - 3 * a) = 4 / 3 - 3 * (a - 2 / 3) ^ 2 := by ring
      have : a * (4 - 3 * a) ≤ 4 / 3 := by nlinarith
      have : a < 1 := by linarith
      have : a ≥ 1 / 4 := by linarith
      nlinarith [hS]
    rw [← Real.log_lt_exp_iff_lt (by linarith)] at h_prod_lt
    exact h_sum_log.trans_lt (by simpa using h_prod_lt)
  rw [← Real.exp_lt_exp_iff, Real.exp_add, Real.exp_log, Real.exp_add, Real.exp_add, Real.exp_add] at h_sum
  · simpa [Real.exp_mul, Real.exp_log, ha, hb, hc, hd0] using h_sum
  · linarith
  · linarith
